sourceContext.originPage: Emergient Contact page (coverage-gap variant of the content-page template)

suitableFor: simple contact forms with text/email inputs, a textarea and a submit button
lead-capture forms on interior content pages
any form driven by a form definition (JSON) rendered by the form block
notSuitableFor: forms with complex conditional branching that need bespoke layout
non-form content that can be authored as default content
